hooks.command: sh -c '[ -n "$AOE_INSTANCE_ID" ] || exit 0; case "$AOE_INSTANCE_ID" in *[!0-9a-zA-Z_-]*) exit 0 ;; esac; mkdir -p "/tmp/aoe-hooks/$AOE_INSTANCE_ID" 2>/dev/null; printf running > "/tmp/aoe-hooks/$AOE_INSTANCE_ID/status" 2>/dev/null; exit 0'

sh -c '[ -n "$AOE_INSTANCE_ID" ] || exit 0; command -v aoe >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; aoe __extract-session-id 2>/dev/null; exit 0 # aoe-hooks'

sh -c '[ -n "$AOE_INSTANCE_ID" ] || exit 0; case "$AOE_INSTANCE_ID" in *[!0-9a-zA-Z_-]*) exit 0 ;; esac; mkdir -p "/tmp/aoe-hooks/$AOE_INSTANCE_ID" 2>/dev/null; printf idle > "/tmp/aoe-hooks/$AOE_INSTANCE_ID/status" 2>/dev/null; exit 0'
sh -c '[ -n "$AOE_INSTANCE_ID" ] || exit 0; command -v aoe >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; aoe __extract-session-id 2>/dev/null; exit 0 # aoe-hooks'
